name: Baked Stuffed Lake Trout, Salmon, or Walleyed Pike
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the stuffing according to your chosen recipe (either CELERY STUFFING or FENNEL/TARRAGON STUFFING).
2. Salt and pepper the fish inside and out.
3. Stuff the fish with the prepared stuffing and secure it by sewing up the opening or skewering it.
4. For scaling pike, do so; scale trout and salmon if needed.
5. Place the fish in a buttered pan with lemon slices along its length and secure each slice with toothpicks.
6. Add marjoram, bay leaf, and white wine to the pan.
7. Bake uncovered at 400°F for about 35 minutes, basting with melted butter and the liquid from the pan.
8. Prepare CELERY STUFFING: Sauté chopped celery and onions in butter until tender.
9. Add celery tops and bread crumbs; season with salt, pepper, and savory. Makes 1 cup.
10. Prepare FENNEL/TARRAGON STUFFING by mixing all ingredients together.
11. Stuff the fish with the prepared stuffing before baking.
Note: A whole baked fish on a garnished platter looks impressive for guests.
